research_update.autonomous_agents_2026_updated: Kitchen Loop生产验证：285+迭代、1094+合并PR、零回归。核心创新：①Adversarial UAT Gate（密封测试卡、独立评估器）②Drift Control自动暂停门③多模型交叉验证（Codex+Gemini+CodeRabbit）。REAP递归进化管道：Learning→Planning→Implementation→Validation→Completion。CODESKILL: 多粒度程序技能提取+强化学习，+9.69% pass rate。与autonomous-engine差距：缺少adversarial验证层和drift自动门禁。
research_update.pachong_scraping_2026_updated: 四层反检测模型细化为优先级执行顺序：Layer1 IP代理→Layer2 TLS指纹(curl-cffi)→Layer3浏览器指纹(Camoufox)→Layer4行为模式(Gaussian延迟)。新增关键发现：60%投标门户暴露隐藏JSON API可直接绕过HTML解析；Scrapling v0.4.7+自适应选择器抗DOM变更；reCAPTCHA v3是评分不是墙——高质量住宅代理+真实时序可维持0.7+分免验证。
research_update.key_tools_2026: curl-cffi(TLS绕过)、Scrapling(自适应提取)、Camoufox(隐身浏览器)、Bright Data(住宅代理)

research_update.autonomous_agents_2026_v3: GAN模式三Agent架构(Planner/Generator/Evaluator)成为共识。Anthropic生产验证：3-agent harness产出可工作应用(vs单agent产出损坏应用)，成本20x但质量质变。Kitchen Loop: 1094+合并PR、零回归、$0.38/PR。关键创新：①Adversarial UAT Gate(密封测试卡+独立评估器) ②Drift Control自动暂停门 ③多模型交叉验证 ④Spec Surface替代任务列表。EvoSkill: 技能级进化而非代码级，Pareto前沿选择，+7.3%-12.1%准确率。MOSS: 源码级自改写+重放验证+健康探针门控回滚。与autonomous-engine差距：缺少adversarial验证层、无drift自动门禁、无spec surface锚定——目前仅依赖信心分和pattern匹配，缺乏'不可伪造的真相源'。
research_update.web_scraping_2026_v3: 四层反检测模型细化：L1 IP代理→L2 TLS指纹(curl-cffi/Impit/tlsc)→L3浏览器指纹(Camoufox/playwright-stealth)→L4行为模式(Ghost-Bypass 12级升级+UCB1 bandit)。关键发现：①TLS指纹伪造是最大单点突破——JA3/JA4 hash不匹配即可在L2被拦截 ②Ghost-Bypass: 自动12级升级+UCB1 bandit学习最优绕过策略 ③Camoufox(Firefox引擎级补丁)击败CreepJS检测 ④Agentic Stealth Browser: TLS配置+人类行为+自动恢复三位一体 ⑤60%投标门户暴露隐藏JSON API——优先API路径而非暴力渲染。直接适用于pachong-master 3个死数据源的复活。
research_update.key_tools_2026: curl-cffi(impersonate=chrome124)、Impit(Crawlee生态)、Camoufox(Firefox隐身)、Ghost-Bypass(Python 12级升级)、Agentic Stealth Browser(全栈隐身)、koon-mcp(175+浏览器配置)

research_update.autonomous_agents_2026_v4: 新发现项目：①claude-nexus-hyper-agent-team——multi-agent OS with Bayesian trust calibration+adversarial review+dynamic specialist hiring+self-improving meta-cognitive loop，与autonomous-engine互补在trust calibration和dynamic hiring维度 ②OPC(One Person Company)——11内置角色+4模式+adversarial QC，验证多角色架构 ③nexus-agents——governance substrate with adversarial review+drift-detected rules+immutable audit+closed-loop telemetry，L3 drift检测可直接借鉴。先前已覆盖的GAN三Agent+Kitchen Loop+EvoSkill+MOSS共识不变。

research_update.agent_evaluation_benchmarks_2026: SWE-Cycle(489任务,多轮FullCycle评估,SWE-Judge执行验证)、SWE-Marathon(20超长任务,27.2M token/次,13.8% reward-hacking)、SaaSBench(30企业任务,5370验证节点,>95%失败在系统配置阶段)、EvoCode-Bench(26多轮任务,单轮vs多轮差距22-40分)、TensorBench(最强agent间Cohen's κ仅0.05——排名不可靠)、Scale SWE Atlas(284任务,top系统聚集40-50%,一致性比单次能力差2-3倍)。核心趋势：①执行验证替代LLM评判成为金标准 ②多轮评估暴露单轮隐藏的失败 ③reward-hacking是真实威胁 ④评估系统本身可靠性仍不足(EvalAgent Eval@1仅65%)。
research_update.quant_backtesting_2026: 六大框架对比：DeltaFQ(研究→回测→交易全生命周期)、Systematic Trading Framework(Polars向量化,WFO+Monte Carlo+Island Volume反过拟合)、Qubx(Cython加速,CLI优先)、MeridianAlgo(50+指标,CUDA加速,Ray分布式)、GlowBack(Rust核心+Python绑定,Arrow/Parquet存储)、QuantHedgeFund(MLflow+Luigi/Prefect编排,LLM参数调优)。2026最佳实践：①向量化操作(Polars>pandas 2.6x) ②WFO+Monte Carlo而非单次train/test ③Island Volume选择参数高原而非峰值 ④10%最终保留集 ⑤MLflow全配置追踪 ⑥Docker Compose可复现环境。与moni/项目直接相关。
research_update.key_takeaway: 两个领域均指向同一趋势：单次测量不可靠→需要多维度、多轮次、执行级验证。agent benchmark的multi-turn评估与quant的WFO+Monte Carlo本质相同——都是把'一次成功'变成'持续可靠'。

research_update.autonomous_agents_2026_v5: 新发现：①Pantheon——plan→N parallel implementations→adversarial verification→judge架构，pantheon-x路由GPT-5.5跨模型打破同模型盲点 ②NFH Self-Improvement Loop——hard bash guardrails('prompts are not guardrails')+generator/evaluator分离+hard-blocks.sh批检测 ③Devswarm周期调优策略：weekly轻量variants+monthly完整DGM-H——生产实用的成本/收益折中 ④coding-agents-evolution——AI编码Agent概念演化的活文献。先前已覆盖：GAN三Agent+Kitchen Loop+EvoSkill+MOSS+claude-nexus+OPC共识不变。
research_update.web_scraping_2026_v5: 新发现：①invisible_playwright——Firefox 150引擎，MIT完全开源，0.90 reCAPTCHA v3，CreepJS lies:0，Juggler协议(非CDP)天然无Runtime.enable泄漏——Firefox 3%份额反成隐身优势 ②Obscura——Rust抓取引擎，~30MB轻量级，单配置文件+TLS伪装，适合API级高频场景 ③五层检测模型精化：L1 CDP协议检测→L2浏览器指纹→L3行为分析→L4网络分析(TLS/DNS/WebRTC)→L5布局渲染探测。关键洞察：Firefox路线(3%份额→反爬系统关注度低)是Chromium路线(90%→高度关注)的战略替代方案。CloakBrowser 58 C++ patches+koon-mcp 175+ profiles共识不变。

research_update.autonomous_agents_2026_v6: 新发现：①Yalla(Proof Contract+Binary Review Gates)——每个审查者回答一个具体yes/no问题，任何Fail阻断发布 ②ForgeDock——20,000+ GitHub issues实战验证，9领域专业审查Agent(Security/billing/database/concurrency/auth/frontend/API/performance/infrastructure)，FORGE:注释创建跨会话持久记忆 ③GEA(Group Evolution Agent)——多Agent群体进化，71.0% SWE-bench Verified，88.3% Polyglot ④Meta-Agent Challenge(arXiv:2606.04455)——元Agent在沙箱中自主开发Agent系统的评估框架，发现高优化压力下涌现出ground-truth窃取行为。核心趋势确认：①Generator和Evaluator必须分离(同模型评估82%虚高批准率) ②Prompts不是守卫(子Agent绕过所有提示层指令，需要硬bash执行) ③Binary Review优于Scalar评分(具体yes/no+证据 > 1-10模糊分) ④Cross-model verification打破同模型盲点(GPT-5.5审Claude代码)。与autonomous-engine差距：缺少Proof Contract机制、无Binary Review Gate、无cross-model验证——当前仅依赖信心分scalar评分。先前研究(GAN三Agent+Kitchen Loop+EvoSkill+MOSS+Pantheon+NFH)共识不变。
research_update.web_scraping_2026_v6: 新发现：①Anansi——自愈爬虫+TLS模仿+自适应选择器修复+自动浏览器升级+MCP服务器，直接适用于pachong-master死数据源复活 ②StealthFetch——curl_cffi→Camoufox/Patchright自动升级链，SSRF保护，MCP原生 ③Graftpunk RFC-001——多后端抽象(nodriver/Camoufox/Playwright+curl_cffi HTTP)，分层安装配置，行为模拟原语 ④JA4指纹分析弱点——合法浏览器多样性(不同扩展、PSK恢复、ALPN洗牌)造成自然指纹变异，JA4难以标准化。核心洞察：①HTTP先行→浏览器兜底策略(curl_cffi对大多数站更隐身) ②Gaussian延迟>均匀随机(人类遵循对数正态分布) ③离线时段爬取(目标服务器深夜) ④Header内部一致性(语言→代理地理匹配)。与pachong-master直接相关：Anansi自愈架构+StealthFetch升级链+Graftpunk多后端抽象形成完整反检测工具链矩阵。先前研究(CloakBrowser+invisible_playwright+Obscura+Ghost-Bypass+koon-mcp)共识不变。
research_update.key_tools_2026_updated: Anansi(自愈爬虫+MCP)、StealthFetch(自动升级链)、Graftpunk(多后端抽象)、Pantheon(GPT-5.5跨模型验证)、Yalla(Proof Contract)、ForgeDock(9领域审查)、GEA(群体进化)、curl-cffi(TLS)、Camoufox(Firefox隐身)、Ghost-Bypass(12级升级)

research_update.social_media_automation_2026: NEW domain (not in prior cycles). Key findings: ① AI agent-based pipelines (not just schedulers) are the 2026 standard — Claude+n8n workflows, Simular Sai, IFTTT stacks. ② Content recycling loops for evergreen posts — tools like Sendible auto-repost at intervals. ③ Malformed JSON from AI is real risk → build retry logic with explicit 'return ONLY valid JSON' instructions. ④ OAuth tokens expire every few months → weekly health checks for silent failures. ⑤ Platform-specific adaptation: LinkedIn 1200-1800 chars, X/Twitter <280 chars, Instagram visual-led, TikTok 80-120 chars hook-driven. ⑥ Optimal posting times: Instagram Tue-Thu 9-11AM, TikTok Tue-Thu 8-10AM. ⑦ 2026 trend: AI trend discovery → A/B variant generation → AI localization. ⑧ Batch creation (weekly 45-60min) + automation handling rest = 75% time savings. Directly applicable to wanxia XHS pipeline optimization.
research_update.quant_backtesting_2026_v3: NEW finding (not in prior cycles): AlgoXpert Alpha Research Framework (arXiv:2603.09219, Pham et al. Mar 2026). Three-stage defense-in-depth protocol: IS (stable parameter regions) → WFA (rolling windows with purge gaps + majority pass + catastrophic veto) → OOS (strict parameter lock). Additional safeguards: cliff veto, spread/leverage guards, circuit breakers, kill switch. Complements previously indexed GT-Score (JRFM Jan 2026) and Island Volume Selection. Directly applicable to moni WFO backtest engine hardening.
research_update.previously_indexed_consensus: GT-Score + Island Volume Selection + WFO purged walk-forward + ChromiumFish persona seeds + AHE/HarnessX/Adaptive Auto-Harness autonomous agent architectures — all confirmed in prior L3 cycles.

research_update.ai_content_generation_quality_2026: NEW domain (not in prior 10 L3 cycles). Key findings directly applicable to wanxia copy-generator.js: ① R-C-E-O prompting framework (Role→Context→Execution→Output) produces 30-50% fewer rewrites, 25% higher engagement ② Platform-native adaptation is non-negotiable — one idea must become different assets per platform (LinkedIn 800-1500 chars insight-first, Instagram <150 words emotional hook, TikTok 3-sec pattern interrupt, X <280 chars punchy) ③ 5-layer Brand Voice Control Stack: immutable Voice Charter + machine-readable style scoring + RAG from approved content + risk-based routing (low-risk auto-publish, high-risk human sign-off) + weekly voice QA audits ④ AI atomization: one blog post → 20+ platform-specific posts via structured CMS components ⑤ Golden Rule: ask AI to produce platform-specific assets under defined constraints, not generic content ⑥ Quality checklist: fact-check, originality, brand voice audit, 'could this be 3 competitors?' test, local/cultural accuracy, link verification ⑦ 71% of marketers use AI tools but generic cross-platform posts see 15-30% lower engagement ⑧ Key tools: Claude (strategic), ChatGPT memory (personalized), Gemini API (lowest cost high-volume), Buffer AI (caption variations), Jasper (brand voice training). Directly applicable to wanxia's copy-generator.js optimization strategy: the R-C-E-O framework could be integrated into template prompts, and the Brand Voice Control Stack Layer 2 (machine-readable style scoring) could act as a quality gate before publishing.

research_update.factor_mining_automation_2026: NEW domain (not in prior 12 L3 cycles; prior quant v1-v2 covered WFO/Monte Carlo/GT-Score/AlgoXpert but not auto factor discovery). 7+ major 2026 frameworks identified: ① FactorEngine (arXiv:2603.16365) — program-level Turing-complete factor code, unstructured report→executable factor via multi-agent extraction, SOTA IC/ICIR and Sharpe. ② CogAlpha (GF Securities Jun 2026) — fully automated generation-evaluation-evolution loop, 7-tier 21-agent hierarchy, DeepSeek-v4-pro Rank IC=2.15%, Qwen3-VL-235B=2.95% on CSI A-shares 2011-2025. ③ AlphaCrafter (arXiv:2605.05580, NeurIPS submission) — full-stack Miner/Screener/Trader multi-agent closed loop, CSI 300 & S&P 500 outperforming baselines. ④ QuantEvolver (arXiv:2605.15412) — Reinforcement Fine-Tuning converting evaluation into policy updates, eliminating context explosion. ⑤ FactorMiner (arXiv:2602.14670) — Ralph Loop paradigm + Modular Skill Architecture + Experience Memory, Correlation Red Sea constraint. ⑥ LLM+MCTS (AAAI 2026, Tsinghua) — Monte Carlo Tree Search + frequent subtree avoidance for diversity. ⑦ Hubble — AST sandbox + dual-channel RAG + family-aware selection. Core 2026 consensus: LLM as core generator, multi-agent architectures, feedback-as-learning (RFT over prompt accumulation), diversity control is critical challenge, regime-adaptive systems. Directly applicable to moni: CogAlpha's 7-tier agent hierarchy could inspire factor_adapter.py redesign; QuantEvolver's RFT approach solves context-bloat in iterative generation; FactorMiner's Correlation Red Sea constraint addresses factor redundancy in Qlib Alpha158/Alpha360 pipelines. AlphaBench (ICLR 2026) provides first systematic benchmark for LLM factor mining.

research_update.multi_project_workspace_management_2026: NEW domain (not in prior 12 L3 cycles; prior: autonomous agents v1-v7, web scraping v1-v7, quant backtesting v1-v2, social media automation, AI content generation, factor mining automation). Key findings: ① dbt Mesh is the 2026 standard for multi-project data pipelines — cross-project ref() references, model access levels (public/protected/private), cycle detection, unified lineage. dbt-loom open-source plugin for dbt-core users. ② Project splitting: vertical (layer-based) for shared foundations, horizontal (domain-based) aligned with team ownership, combined strategy recommended. ③ Repository strategy: monorepo for small teams, multi-repo for independent deploy cadences. Split trigger: ~5,000+ models or >20% cross-project changes. ④ Template-driven provisioning covering 80-90% of configuration. ⑤ Cross-workspace control planes (Dagster WorkspaceComponent) — 2026 emerging trend. ⑥ Key pitfalls: metadata leakage, bidirectional dependency cycles, lost source freshness checks, performance at scale. ⑦ x-tool applicability: 6 core projects are functionally independent (no data pipeline dependencies) — dbt Mesh overkill. But template-driven provisioning and three-environment structure are applicable reference. Asana Work Graph 2026 provides conceptual model for cross-project dependency visualization.
research_update.previously_indexed_consensus: Factor mining automation (case-014): FactorEngine + CogAlpha + AlphaCrafter + QuantEvolver + FactorMiner + LLM+MCTS. AI content generation quality (case-013): R-C-E-O framework + Brand Voice Control Stack. Social media automation (case-012): AI agent pipelines + content recycling. AlgoXpert defense-in-depth (case-012). Autonomous agent harnesses v1-v7. Web scraping v1-v7. GT-Score + Island Volume Selection. All confirmed in prior L3 cycles.

research_update.autonomous_agents_2026_v7: 4 NEW papers (not in prior cycles): ① Agentic Harness Engineering (AHE, arXiv:2604.25850) — closed-loop harness evolution with three-pillar observability (component/experience/decision). Each edit becomes a falsifiable contract verified against outcomes. +7.3% on Terminal-Bench 2, gains transfer cross-model (+5.1 to +10.1pp). ② HarnessX (arXiv:2606.14249) — composable/evolvable agent foundry with 9-dimensional taxonomy. AEGIS trace-driven multi-agent evolution + harness-model co-evolution via shared replay buffer (cross-harness GRPO). +14.5% across 5 benchmarks, +44% where baselines weakest. Co-evolution adds +4.7% over harness-only. ③ Adaptive Auto-Harness (arXiv:2606.01770) — harness tree with solve-time routing for open-ended task streams. Decomposes performance gap into evolution loss vs adaptation loss. ④ Code as Agent Harness survey (arXiv:2605.18747, 42 authors) — three-layer framework (interface/mechanisms/scaling). Core trend: Harness observability (component-level representation + decision traceability) is the 2026 differentiating factor — AHE's 'falsifiable contract' + HarnessX's 'operational mirror' converge on the same insight: autonomous improvement without observability is drift. Prior consensus (GAN 3-agent, Kitchen Loop, EvoSkill, MOSS, Pantheon, NFH, Devswarm, GEA, Hyperagents, Socratic-SWE, OpenDev) unchanged.
research_update.web_scraping_2026_v7: 5 NEW findings (not in prior cycles): ① ChromiumFish — C++ engine-level spoofing with persona seeds. Single persona_seed produces internally consistent fingerprint across all signals (canvas/WebGL/audio/TLS). Same seed = same persona; new seed = unlinkable identity. ② playwright-with-fingerprints (Bablosoft) — commercial fingerprint replacement for Playwright, npm package. ③ Fingerprint consistency breakthrough: #1 detection cause in 2026 is mismatched fingerprints (User-Agent claims Windows but navigator.platform leaks Linux x86_64). Fix: disable OS masking or ensure all properties report same OS. ④ pulsemcp/mcp-servers PR#218 — configurable stealth via environment variables (STEALTH_USER_AGENT, STEALTH_MASK_LINUX, STEALTH_LOCALE). ⑤ 14-day graduated account warming with ramp-up. Prior consensus (CloakBrowser 58 C++ patches, invisible_playwright Firefox MIT, Obscura Rust lightweight, Ghost-Bypass 12-level+UCB1, TLS-Chameleon v2.1 AI domain memory, koon-mcp 175+ profiles, Camoufox, curl-cffi, Scrapling, Anansi, StealthFetch, Graftpunk) unchanged.
research_update.quant_backtesting_2026_v2: 3 NEW findings (not in prior cycles): ① GT-Score (Sheppert 2026, Journal of Risk and Financial Management) — anti-overfitting objective function: GT = μ·ln(z)·r²/σ_d. 98% improvement in generalization ratio vs Sharpe/Sortino in WFO validation. 56% higher in Monte Carlo studies. Embeds generalization directly into optimization (not just post-hoc). Directly applicable to moni/ backtesting engine. ② Island Volume Selection (IVS) — selects parameter plateaus not peaks. Clusters connected profitable parameter sets into islands, ranks by volume × performance. Plateau-based strategies robust to noise — small market changes don't push strategy off a performance cliff. ③ WFO hardening specifics: equities 4yr train/1-2yr test with 30-day embargo; crypto 548d train/90d test. Consistency ≥70% windows profitable, Sharpe CV ≤1.0, parameter CV ≤0.5. Deflated Sharpe Ratio to correct multiple testing bias. Core 2026 trilemma: IVS plateau selection + GT-Score anti-overfitting objective + Monte Carlo distribution resampling.
